chunks.title: The Levite's Journey Begins
chunks.reason: Introduces the characters and the initial journey to retrieve the concubine.

chunks.title: Arrival in Gibeah
chunks.reason: Describes the travelers' arrival at night and their reception by an old man.

chunks.title: The Vile Men Attack
chunks.reason: Details the mob's arrival and the abuse of the concubine.

chunks.title: The Levite's Reaction
chunks.reason: Concludes with the discovery of the body and the cutting of the concubine.
